label: get_block_wrapper_attributes
documentation: Generates the wrapper attributes for a block based on the block supports

label: register_block_type
documentation: Registers a block type from a block.json file or array configuration

label: render_block
documentation: Renders a single block into a HTML string

label: parse_blocks
documentation: Parses blocks out of a content string

label: serialize_blocks
documentation: Takes a block or list of blocks and returns the serialized post content

label: has_blocks
documentation: Determines whether a post or content string has blocks

label: register_block_pattern
documentation: Registers a block pattern

label: register_block_style
documentation: Registers a block style variation

label: wp_register_script
documentation: Register a script for later use

label: wp_enqueue_script
documentation: Enqueue a script

label: wp_register_style
documentation: Register a style for later use

label: wp_enqueue_style
documentation: Enqueue a style

label: wp_add_inline_script
documentation: Add extra code to a registered script

label: wp_add_inline_style
documentation: Add extra CSS styles to a registered stylesheet

label: wp_set_script_translations
documentation: Sets translated strings for a script handle

label: get_post_meta
documentation: Retrieve a post meta field for the given post ID

label: update_post_meta
documentation: Update a post meta field based on the given post ID

documentation: Add a meta field to the given post

label: delete_post_meta
documentation: Delete a post meta field for the given post ID

label: get_option
documentation: Retrieves an option value based on an option name

documentation: Update the value of an option that was already added

label: add_option
documentation: Add a new option

label: delete_option
documentation: Remove an option by name

label: esc_html
documentation: Escape HTML blocks

label: esc_attr
documentation: Escape HTML attributes

label: esc_url
documentation: Checks and cleans a URL

label: esc_js
documentation: Escape single quotes, htmlspecialchar "<>" and fix line endings

documentation: Sanitize content for allowed HTML tags for post content

documentation: Sanitizes a string from user input or from the database

documentation: Strips out all characters that are not allowable in an email

label: sanitize_url
documentation: Sanitizes a URL for use in a redirect

label: add_action
documentation: Hook a function or method to a specific filter action

label: remove_action
documentation: Remove a function from a specified action hook

label: add_filter
documentation: Hook a function or method to a specific filter action

label: remove_filter
documentation: Remove a function from a specified filter hook

label: apply_filters
documentation: Calls the callback functions that have been added to a filter hook

label: do_action
documentation: Execute functions hooked on a specific action hook
